goals: Calculate how a retirement savings amount might grow over time with compound interest
Compare investment growth across different interest rate scenarios
Calculate the present value of a future financial goal
Compare different discount options for a major purchase

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and pragmatic, approaches financial topics with the same storytelling mindset used in scriptwriting—wants to understand the narrative behind numbers.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic financial concepts but is not mathematically inclined. Does not know tool names or internal APIs. Learns best through concrete examples and clear results.

end_condition: The user has explored all four financial scenarios and has the numerical results needed to make informed decisions about their savings and purchase options.
